scope_summary.problem: Jet AOT build produces ~206.8 KB vs Vite's ~192 KB (~7.7% larger) due to per-module wrapper overhead. Scope hoisting inlines single-importer modules to reduce wrappers and enable cross-module DCE.
scope_summary.success_criteria: Bundle size ≤195 KB on react-bench. Single-importer modules inlined. Circular deps excluded. All existing tests pass.

boundary.in_scope: Module concatenation in bundler/scope_hoist.rs, sideEffects detection, circular dependency exclusion, cross-module DCE
boundary.out_of_scope: Dynamic import splitting (already works), CSS pipeline, dev server
boundary.constraints: Must not break existing behavior. Draft spec and scaffold already exist.
